strategic_goal: Demonstrate a deterministic retail-footwear Intent-to-Outcome loop in stub mode with inspectable evidence, proposals, simulated actions, and measured outcomes.

immediate_checkpoint.title: IntentContextV1
immediate_checkpoint.goal: Represent confirmed goals, constraints, preferences, permissions, optimization targets, and forbidden objectives without adding runtime, API, persistence, live sources, or UI behavior.

constraints: Preserve Active portfolio demo, Saga Console, module registry/SDK, Saga runtime, and deterministic stub mode.
Do not introduce API routes, persistence tables, live sources, provider calls, or UI behavior during Phase 1 contracts and policies.
Do not silently convert inferred interests into confirmed goals.
Consequential capabilities remain independently permissioned and human-gated.
No real financial, public, physical, or privacy-sensitive effect is authorized.
Universal contracts remain domain-neutral; retail knowledge belongs in later vertical modules.
Every slice uses stable diagnostics, deterministic fixtures, schema snapshots, focused tests, Candidate gate, and Cold Review.

requires: evidence and outcome inspection in the reviewer path
